title: Mesembryanthemum meyeri
intro: Mesembryanthemum meyeri, also known as the iceplant or succulent Mesembryanthemum, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the family Aizoaceae. The health benefits of Mesembryanthemum meyeri include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of arthritis, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage due to its antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, glycosides, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Mesembryanthemum meyeri include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
taxonomy: Mesembryanthemum meyeri is classified in the following order: Kingdom - Plantae, Clade - Angiosperms, Clade - Eudicots, Clade - Caryophyllales, Family - Aizoaceae, Genus - Mesembryanthemum, Species - M. meyeri.
